note: The EPD reports four distinct product variants (50mm and 75mm thickness, manufactured at MLG and JJR plants), each with its own A1-A3 GWP per 1 m2: 50mm MLG = 14.82, 75mm MLG = 20.05, 50mm JJR = 18.52, 75mm JJR = 25.05 kg CO2-eq. Only a single total Global Warming Potential (GWP) indicator is reported (CML method); no separate GWP-fossil, GWP-biogenic or GWP-GHG values are given. A single representative A1-A3 value cannot be selected, so gwp_total_a1a3 is left null.
